statement: In every magma, Equation 2833 (`x = ((y * z) * (w * z)) * z`) implies Equation 235 (`x = (y * (y * z)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0625
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op w z)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op y z)) y)
